$doc: Performance budgets — Master.md §12.6.6: budgets are requirements, regress-tested like correctness. Measured by scripts/perf-budgets.mjs. Numbers are initial ceilings set 2026-07-10 before a recorded baseline; tighten them as real baselines land, never loosen without a Master.md-conscious reason in the commit message.

coldBootToHealthyMs.why: dev-mode (tsx) runtime boot to /health 200. Desktop sidecar boot must feel instant-adjacent; 6s is the never-worse-than ceiling for CI dev boots.

healthP95Ms.why: /health is the liveness hot path polled by the shell; it must never queue behind work.

searchP50Ms.why: POST /api/search grounded answer, warm. TCI retrieval is the IDE's understanding loop — JetBrains-style 'intelligence that taxes the loop' is the named failure mode (research doc E1/E4).

searchP95Ms.why: tail latency ceiling for grounded search before it reads as 'stuck'.

desktop.$todo: cold start to interactive, keystroke-to-paint, session-spawn time — measurable only in a desktop session with the app running; wire via visual-drive scripts when the P1 shell lands.
